blended.narrative: Schweitzer is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,291 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 3.8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 55".
